expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves Google Sheets export entry points, scope boundaries, and format constraints before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly enumerates the benchmark focus items ("Google Sheets export entry points", "Scope boundaries", "Format constraints") and ties them to Phase 1 context intake (spawn manifest evidence collection) "before any scenario drafting." It also lists what Phase 1 would need to collect to preserve those items.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: result.md frames itself as "Phase 1 Contract Check" and assesses only Phase 1 requirements (spawn manifest generation, --post validation) without drafting scenarios; it states: "This report intentionally stays within Phase 1 contract" and flags the missing phase1_spawn_manifest.json as the blocker.
